positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a majestic golden retriever running through a vibrant, abstract field of bioluminescent flowers. The dog is captured mid-leap, forming a clean silhouette against a twilight sky with deep indigo and magenta gradients. The flowers and grass should use highly contrasting complementary colors (lime green, cyan, bright orange) and exhibit clean, graphic outlines. The overall composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for single-color printing on fabric. Vector art aesthetic, high contrast, pop art style, golden ratio composition, flat illustration, perfect for apparel print, graphic design.
negative: photorealistic, low detail, blur, text, watermark, signature, logos, artifacts, bad anatomy, noisy, extra limbs, copyright, graffiti, messy, dirty, poorly drawn
